differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired pneumonia with sepsis-induced capillary leak
next_steps: Targeted hantavirus testing (RT-PCR and IgM/IgG serology)
Leptospirosis diagnostic testing (PCR and microscopic agglutination test)
Serum and urine studies for dengue (NS1 antigen and PCR)
Bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) with analysis for infectious etiologies and cytology for hemorrhage
Serial monitoring of hematocrit, platelets, and coagulopathy to track capillary leak progression
Management of acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS) via lung-protective ventilation strategies
Urinalysis to assess for hematuria or proteinuria to further rule out pulmonary-renal involvement
